positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos
% SZS output start Proof for pos
1. private_ivy_research_university(yale_university) [input(axiom)]
2. moved_to_new_haven(yale_university) [input(axiom)]
3. ? [X0] : (private_ivy_research_university(X0) & moved_to_new_haven(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~? [X0] : (private_ivy_research_university(X0) & moved_to_new_haven(X0)) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ! [X0] : (~private_ivy_research_university(X0) | ~moved_to_new_haven(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
6. private_ivy_research_university(yale_university) [cnf transformation 1]
7. moved_to_new_haven(yale_university) [cnf transformation 2]
8. ~moved_to_new_haven(X0) | ~private_ivy_research_university(X0) [cnf transformation 5]
9. ~private_ivy_research_university(yale_university) [resolution 7,8]
10. $false [forward subsumption resolution 9,6]
% SZS output end Proof for pos
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:

    define private_ivy_research_university(X0) := $true
